content.en:
Ye Tian naturally signed up, although he had a fifty percent chance of becoming a fivefold ancestor, but who didn't want a higher chance?

Therefore, he naturally wanted to obtain more primordial gold beads!

Not only did he sign up, but all the other sons signed up.

Don't talk about whether you can enter the original golden mile, sign up for it first, in case you enter the original golden mile and get the benefits, it will be a big opportunity!

Of course.

This time, not only them, the Holy Son, but also those deacons and true disciples of the peak of the Quadruple Origin Ancestor may also sign up, although some of the powerhouses of the peak of the Quadruple Origin Ancestor are not Holy Sons, and there are not many extreme ways to comprehend, but if they have cultivated for countless years, they may also master some hole cards, such as the top Holy Arts, and they may have the hope of being comparable to the weaker Holy Sons.

It's like this batch of newly promoted Holy Sons, their cultivation has not yet been promoted to the peak of the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, and they really may not be able to beat those old Quadruple Peak Primordial Ancestors.

......

"After the 30,000 Primordial Realm Era, the Primordial Golden Domain will be opened, and my cultivation is still in the middle stage of the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, so I have to speed up my cultivation!" Ye Tian said darkly.

He continued to improve his cultivation before, using more ordinary resources, and many extremely precious treasures that could greatly improve resources, he kept them and did not use them.

After all, he wasn't in a hurry to break through his cultivation before, but now he can't keep it anymore, and he must improve his cultivation as soon as possible.

And so.

In the following years, Ye Tian frantically improved his cultivation and consumed all kinds of extremely cherished resources.

As time passed, Ye Tian's cultivation continued to improve and skyrocketed. 、

Finally, after the 10,000 Origin Domain Era, his cultivation was promoted to the late realm of the Quadruple Origin Ancestor, and the resources spent were resources that ordinary Quadruple Origin Ancestors would not dare to imagine!

"There are still 20,000 years left in the Origin Domain Era, I'm afraid I still won't be able to raise my cultivation to the peak realm of the Quadruple Origin Ancestor!"

Ye Tian frowned.

If you don't reach the peak realm of the Quadruple Ancestor, you will suffer completely!

He didn't dare to underestimate the other fourfold ancestors in the primordial realm, among them there was definitely an existence that far surpassed the nine primordial ancestors, in case someone entered the primordial golden realm and directly broke through to the half-step fivefold primordial ancestor realm, the strength might really surpass him.

Therefore, he had to raise his cultivation to the peak of the Quadruple Ancestor, at least he would not be too weak in cultivation.

this day.

Feng Ming's Ancestor informed him that the Void Tooth Holy Gate was going to let him enter a place to practice.

"It seems that the Void Tooth Holy Gate is preparing to temporarily cultivate me and improve my strength!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to a secret time and space of the Void Fang Holy Gate, where he saw a long river of purple gold.

Airplanes!

The figure of Feng Ming's Primordial Ancestor appeared, pointing to this Purple Gold Long River: "This is made up of many precious resources, it is the most suitable for the Fourfold Ancestor to improve your cultivation, and the Void Tooth Holy Gate has refined this Purple Gold River, mainly to improve your cultivation." If you cultivate more than 10,000 Origin Realm Epochs here, and with your own resources, you should be able to raise your cultivation to the peak realm of the Quadruple Origin Ancestor. "

"Thank you Feng Ming Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"Go ahead!"

Feng Ming's original ancestor said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian flew into the interior of the Purple Gold River, feeling that his body was cheering, frantically absorbing the energy of the Purple Gold River.

And soon, several Holy Sons came one after another, all of them were Holy Sons in the late stage of the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, and they were only one step away from breaking through to the peak of the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor.

With this purple gold river, they can at least be promoted to the peak of the Quadruple Ancestor.

Rumble!!!

Countless pure energy poured into Ye Tian's body, and was absorbed and refined by him, improving his cultivation.

Combined with his incomparably precious resources, the speed of cultivation was incomparably fast.

Gradually, the 10,000 years of the Primordial Era passed.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian's cultivation broke through again and reached the peak realm of the Fourfold Ancestor!

"Breakthrough, the next step is the half-step fivefold ancestor realm!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

If you want to ascend to the half-step fivefold ancestor realm, you must quench the Will Pagoda more than nine times, and it is difficult to temper it once, you need to use the Extreme Dao Quenching Technique to temper the Will Pagoda thousands of times, and when it touches a shackle in the underworld, it is difficult to continue refining, which means that the limit has been reached.

Break the limit and complete the first tempering!

At this time, you can move on to the second tempering!

Moreover, refining the Will Pagoda is also equivalent to refining the will of the Extreme Dao, which will make the will of the Extreme Dao more and more tenacious and powerful, and its own strength will naturally become stronger and stronger.

It is not very difficult to become a half-step fivefold ancestor, only the Extreme Dao Quenching Technique can be slowly broken through, it is just a matter of time.

For this level, the more extreme extreme paths comprehended, the better the effect of the extreme path refining technique.

However, the more layers of the Pagoda of Will, the more Extreme Dao Will it possesses, far surpassing that of other Ancestors, so on the whole, the speed of refining will not be much faster.

It's like Ye Tian has three hundred and sixty-five layers of Will Pagoda, he needs to refine three hundred and sixty-five layers of Will Pagoda at the same time, and the difficulty is naturally greater.

Of course, compared to the ordinary Quadruple Ancestor, his refining speed was still a little faster.

If you get a resource that can refine the will of the Extreme Dao and is suitable for the peak powerhouse of the Quadruple Ancestor, then the refining speed will be faster.

"I've obtained a lot of these resources, if I refine the Will Pagoda, the speed of completing a tempering should be very fast!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Cultivating to break through to the peak of the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, this Purple Gold River would be of no use to Ye Tian.

He left the place and returned to his quarters.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to refine the Will Pagoda with all his might.

He combined the Extreme Dao Quenching Technique with the three hundred and sixty-five Extreme Extreme Dao that he had comprehended to form his own exclusive Extreme Dao Quenching Technique, and then combined it with some resources to continuously refine his Will Pagoda.

However, there was less than 10,000 Origin Realms left before he could go to the Primordial Golden Domain, and it was impossible for him to complete the refining of his Will Pagoda in such a short period of time.

Before you know it, it's time to head to the Primordial Golden Mile.

......

this day.

The Void Tooth Holy Gate took a group of Fourfold Origin Ancestor Holy Sons, some top True Transmission disciples and deacons who were very close to the half-step Fivefold Origin Ancestor to the Origin Golden Domain.

Airplanes!

Under the leadership of the Heavenly Crescent Holy Ancestor, many Primordial Ancestors escaped into a coordinate of the Primordial Black Sea, and after shuttling for a short time, they came to the barrier of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain.

At this point, the average ancestor couldn't move forward at all.

I saw that the Heavenly Crescent Holy Ancestor directly smashed this layer of barrier and continued to move forward.

Then, after passing through a medium primordial transit station, he came to the place of the second barrier, broke the barrier again, and continued to move forward.

Finally, after breaking the three barriers, he arrived at the destination of this time, the original golden mile.

"Hey, it's an area that exists directly in the primordial Black Sea!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

At first, he thought that this Primordial Golden Domain was similar to those Primordial Domains, just bordering the Primordial Black Sea, but he didn't expect that it was directly a part of the Primordial Black Sea, but it had undergone special changes to form this special area.

Now.

The area is cordoned off, you can see it, but you can't get in.

And a magnificent pagoda stands on the primordial Black Sea, and a majestic figure stands near here, all of them are a five-fold ancestor, and there may even be a half-step six-fold ancestor.

"Here, all the original ancestors are low-key, this is not the Upper Spirit Origin Domain!"

The Heavenly Crescent Saint Ancestor reminded.

Many Primordial Ancestors nodded.
